name: Blue Acquisition Corp/Cayman
business: Blue Acquisition Corp/Cayman is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on February 10, 2025, formed for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses. It has generated no operating revenues to date. On November 19, 2025, it entered into a Business Combination Agreement with Blockfusion, Pubco, and Merger Subs to acquire Blockfusion through a merger.

exposures.sentence: Manufacturing companies or data centers with the need to become energy independent or partially independent, with a leading industry position and recognized leadership.
Solar and/or wind with battery energy storage systems integration.
Solar and/or wind with battery energy storage systems integration.
Second & third-generation geothermal and synthetic geothermal for reliable, renewable energy.
Next-generation nuclear reactors and commercialized fusion power for groundbreaking energy efficiency as they become commercially available.
Next-generation nuclear reactors and commercialized fusion power for groundbreaking energy efficiency as they become commercially available.
Hydropower solutions to leverage existing renewable infrastructure where we can acquire existing hydro resources, and the power is otherwise not available to the grid.

catalysts.sentence: The Blockfusion BCA may be terminated at any time prior to the Closing by either us or Blockfusion if the Closing does not occur by May 31, 2026, or such other date as may be extended pursuant to the Blockfusion BCA.

We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) March 16, 2027, the end of our Combination Period, which is 21 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
